cards.name: 9 of Wands
cards.interpretation: last stand, persistence, grit, resilience, perseverance, close to success, fatigue

cards.name: Knight of Pentacles, reversed
cards.interpretation: workaholic, laziness, dull, boring, no initiative, cheap, irresponsible, gambler, risky investments

cards.name: 8 of Wands, reversed
cards.interpretation: waiting, slowness, chaos, delays, losing momentum, hastiness, being unprepared
